subtasks.description: Query spend database to retrieve current month spend and calculate 3-month rolling average for all cost centers/departments. Return both metrics with variance percentage.

Analyze current vs. 3-month average spend deltas and classify each anomaly as normal_variance (within threshold), concerning (elevated variance), or critical (significant outlier). Generate classification rules and output structured results with severity levels.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to compute spend metrics with rolling averages and variance—multi-table join logic across time periods justifies mid-tier; (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to classify anomalies based on variance thresholds and produce severity categorization. Cross_recon is appropriate here because it reconciles current state against historical baseline and applies classification logic as part of anomaly detection. No separate policy_action is needed because classification is inherent to the anomaly detection task. Total: 2 subtasks, minimal scope, efficient pipeline.

output.sql: WITH monthly_spend AS (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)::DATE AS month, vendor_name AS cost_center, SUM(amount_usd) AS monthly_total FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date), vendor_name), rolling_avg AS (SELECT cost_center, month, monthly_total, AVG(monthly_total) OVER (PARTITION BY cost_center ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS avg_3month_prior FROM monthly_spend), current_month_data AS (SELECT cost_center, month, monthly_total, avg_3month_prior, CASE WHEN avg_3month_prior IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(((monthly_total - avg_3month_prior) / avg_3month_prior * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) END AS variance_pct, CASE WHEN avg_3month_prior IS NULL THEN 'insufficient_data' WHEN ABS((monthly_total - avg_3month_prior) / avg_3month_prior) <= 0.15 THEN 'normal_variance' WHEN ABS((monthly_total - avg_3month_prior) / avg_3month_prior) > 0.15 AND ABS((monthly_total - avg_3month_prior) / avg_3month_prior) <= 0.35 THEN 'concerning' ELSE 'critical' END AS anomaly_classification FROM rolling_avg WHERE month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::DATE) SELECT cost_center, month, monthly_total AS current_month_spend, avg_3month_prior AS three_month_rolling_avg, variance_pct, anomaly_classification FROM current_month_data ORDER BY ABS(variance_pct) DESC NULLS LAST
